nodes.label: Ammiel
nodes.description: One of the sons of Obed-edom the Levite (1 Chr. 26:5).

nodes.label: Jehozabad
nodes.description: The son of Obed-edom (1 Chr. 26:4), one of the Levite porters.

nodes.label: Joah
nodes.description: One of the sons of Obed-edom (1 Chr. 26:4), a Korhite porter.

nodes.label: Nethaneel
nodes.description: A temple porter, of the family of the Korhites (1 Chr. 26:4).

nodes.label: Peulthai
nodes.description: Wages of the Lord, one of the sons of Obed-edom, a Levite porter (1 Chr. 26:5).

nodes.label: Sacar
nodes.description: A son of Obed-edom the Gittite, and a temple porter (1 Chr. 26:4).

nodes.label: Shemaiah
nodes.description: The eldest son of Obed-edom (1 Chr. 26:4-8).

verses.text: Ammiel the sixth, Issachar the seventh, Peulthai the eighth: for God blessed him.
